title: On the Move
content:
If you see strange things, don't be alarmed. I'm moving my data to a new  "server":http://www.hostvector.com  at the moment. Everything should be back to normal within several days (generally 48 hours from now).

Thanks to  "พี่หมี":http://www.sapolar.com  for the cool recommendation. :)

 **update**  (01/11/2004 @ 01:15 AM) : It seems like I'm the only one who can't access my own website. I'm still being pointed back to  TBOX on the old server. I guess this is one of the DNS propagation issue. Maybe this will take more than 48 hours to resolve. Oh well ...

 **update 2**  (01/11/2004 @ 12:09 PM) : I'm no longer certain whether this is a DNS issue or ISP cache issue. But still, I can't access my site. So sad ...

 **update 3**  (01/12/2004 @ 07:00 AM) : Finally, time fixes everything. I'm able to get to my site once again and every system is up and running smoothly. Time to "really update" the TBOX. :P
